{{Quote|I cannot expect others to love science the way I do.|Risha Sinan|<ref name="SWG:BMS" />}}
'''Risha Sinan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]. She lived in the city of [[Restuss]] before it was destroyed in the [[Battle of Restuss]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Bark mites! Fascinating little creatures, but they absolutely destroy the greenery! I recently found a mutant variant that may yield information that may lead to a chemical that will repel these insects.|Risha Sinan, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BMS" />}}
Sinan was fascinated with the local giant [[bark mite]]s. But as these creatures constantly destroyed the greenery, she searched for a chemical solution to repel them. Shortly before the [[Battle of Restuss]], Sinan found a mutant variant of giant bark mites and hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to travel to their [[Giant Bark Mite Cave|hive]] and collect specimens of the different variants.<ref name="SWG:BMS" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateCommonerHumanFemale.png|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Risha Sinan]]
Risha Sinan was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BMS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Risha Sinan gave players a mission to travel to the giant bark mite cave and kill several creatures. After completing the mission, players were rewarded with 5,700 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and a Bubble Tank Draft Schematic or an Enhanced View Cone. Because Risha Sinan spawned under the commoner_human_female template, her appearance was randomly generated. However, she consistently appeared as a Human female.<ref name="SWG:BMS" />

Risha Sinan was removed from the game on June 27, 2006 due to the changes done to Restuss in preparation to the Battle of Restuss event, during which the city was destroyed. She was removed from the game during the release of [[:w:c:swg:Update Notes: June 27 2006|Publish 29/Chapter 1]] on [[June 27]], [[2006]]. During this update, changes were made to [[:w:c:swg:Restuss|Restuss]] in preparation for the upcoming Battle of Restuss event, during which the city was destroyed.
